SCADA Standards Appendix A 
HFC AWTP Master Plan

SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
115
artifact_summary: Visual standard screenshot of a Constant Speed Motor Faceplate for Sump Pump No.1 within Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A.
artifact_blurb: A compliant SCADA operator interface screenshot depicting the 'Constant Speed Motor Faceplate' assigned to 'Sump Pump No.1'. The interface includes critical status indicators for 'Motor Running Status' (distinguishing between Fault and Running states) and standard navigation icons, adhering to the visual specifications defined in Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A.
